cards.back: A technique to embed secret data within the text in a way that the data cannot be detected without proper decryption
Data hiding has various applications in steganography, copyright protection, secure communication, and data protection
A data hiding technique that embeds a secret message or signature into an image or audio file
Simple and practical methods of data hiding, such as hiding data in the least significant bits of an image
Techniques like Least Significant Bit (LSB) substitution, which replaces the least significant bits of pixels with the secret data
